Bus Timings

Bus Stop at Jamal Building, Muhaisnah 4 in Dubai

December 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building Bus Stop is a key transit point nestled in the bustling Muhaisnah 4 area of Dubai. Serving as a central hub for both residents and visitors, it connects easily to a variety of local amenities, including dining establishments, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities. Strategically positioned to facilitate convenient travel across the city, this bus stop plays a crucial role in enhancing connectivity and accessibility within the vibrant Dubai landscape.

Address

Muhaisnah 4, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

Map

View on Google Maps here.

The Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building Bus Stop is a crucial transit hub situated in the lively Muhaisnah 4 area of Dubai. This bus stop offers a convenient point of access for both residents and visitors, providing easy connections to a range of local amenities, dining options, and shopping centers. Its strategic location ensures it serves as a gateway to various destinations within Dubai.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building Bus Stop is serviced by several bus routes, ensuring frequent and reliable transportation throughout the day:

Bus Route Destination Timings
X28 Al Qusais 6:10 AM, 6:30 AM, 6:50 AM, 7:10 AM, 7:30 AM, 7:50 AM, 8:10 AM, 8:30 AM
36 Deira City Centre 6:15 AM, 6:35 AM, 6:55 AM, 7:15 AM, 7:35 AM, 7:55 AM, 8:15 AM, 8:35 AM
34 Al Nahda 6:20 AM, 6:40 AM, 7:00 AM, 7:20 AM, 7:40 AM, 8:00 AM, 8:20 AM, 8:40 AM
56 Jumeirah Village Circle 6:25 AM, 6:45 AM, 7:05 AM, 7:25 AM, 7:45 AM, 8:05 AM, 8:25 AM, 8:45 AM

Bus Route Details

  • X28 Route: Connects Muhaisnah 4 to Al Qusais, offering frequent service starting early in the morning until late evening.

  • 36 Route: Provides a direct link to Deira City Centre, ideal for shopping and entertainment.
  • 34 Route: Serves the Al Nahda area, providing access to additional amenities and services.
  • 56 Route: Links Muhaisnah 4 to Jumeirah Village Circle, offering connections to a wider area of Dubai.

Nearby Destinations

The Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building Bus Stop is well-positioned to access a variety of local amenities and attractions:

Restaurants

  • Milan Veg Muhaisnah Restaurant: Offers a range of vegetarian dishes in a cozy environment.

  • Shater Dunes Restaurant: Known for its Middle Eastern cuisine and friendly atmosphere.
  • King Chef Restaurant: Features a diverse menu with both local and international options.
  • Authentic Angels Bisaya Restaurant, Al Qusais Branch: Specializes in authentic Filipino food.
  • Yum Biryani Restaurant: Famous for its flavorful biryani and South Asian dishes.
  • Subway Restaurant: Provides customizable sandwiches and salads for a quick meal.

Accommodation

  • Aviva United Hotel Apartments: Comfortable and well-equipped apartments for both short and long stays.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Dunes Hotel Apartments Al Qusais: Offers a range of amenities for a pleasant stay.

Landmarks

  • Galadari Motor Driving Center: A major center for driving tests and vehicle-related services.

  • S. S. Lootah Building: A significant local landmark with notable architecture.
  • Al Sara Digital Studio: Popular for photography and digital media services.
  • Awqaf Building: An important building for Islamic endowment services and community activities.

Healthcare

  • Deira Veterinary Clinic: Offers veterinary services and pet care.

Shopping Centers

  • Al Adil Supermarket: A local supermarket with a variety of groceries and daily essentials.

  • Twin Towers Shopping Center: Features numerous shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

Pharmacies

  • Pharma One Pharmacy: Well-stocked for all your pharmaceutical needs.

  • Dar Al Naseem Pharmacy: Offers a broad selection of medicines and health supplies.
  • Aster Pharmacy: Known for its extensive range of pharmaceuticals and health-related products.

Nearby Stops

  1. Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building 2(60m): 62

  2. Muhaisnah 4, Lootah Building 1(202m): 13B, 17, F02

  3. Muhaisnah 4, Fewa-1(248m): 13, 13A, 13B, 13D, 17, 32C, 33, F02, X13, X28

  4. Muhaisnah 4, Fewa-2(308m): 13, 32C, 33, 62

  5. Muhaisnah 4, Lootah Building 2(316m): 62

The Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building Bus Stop is more than just a transit point; it is a hub of convenience in a dynamic and diverse community. Its strategic location, accessibility features, and proximity to essential services and attractions make it an important stop for anyone traveling within Dubai. Whether you’re commuting for work, shopping, or exploring the local area, this bus stop provides an efficient and comfortable way to navigate the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 31, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
